title: Soft Power
questions: What is Hard Power? Why is it effective? How is it effective? How is it used today?
What is Soft Power? What kinds of things make Soft Power? Does tourism matter? Can a country's sports change their image? How do brands contribute to Soft Power?
Where does your country stand in terms of Soft Power? How can you improve? Is it good or bad? What is the goal for your country's Soft Power?

How can your country introduce itself to the world? What is your country's Identity? Should your country change? What do people think about your country? Why do people believe first impressions are so important? Does this apply to countries?
